entities.description: accuracy  inclusion based  is a soft match metric used to evaluate model predictions by checking if the normalized gold answer is included in the generated response
llm refers to large language models  the type of technology whose generation nature is described as uncontrollable in the text
prior works refer to previous research studies cited in the text as a basis for the methodology
3 is a citation number referring to a specific prior work mentioned in the text
34 is a citation number referring to a specific prior work mentioned in the text
46 is a citation number referring to a specific prior work mentioned in the text
soft match metric is a category of evaluation methods described as being used in the text
normalized gold answer is the reference data used to determine if a prediction is correct
model s generated response is the output produced by the model being evaluated
strict exact match is a comparison method explicitly contrasted with the soft match metric in the text

relations.description: accuracy  inclusion based  is utilized to account for the uncontrollable nature of llm generation
accuracy  inclusion based  is utilized following prior works cited as  3  34  46
